Findings.Title: Storage account allows public blob access in main.bicep
Findings.Detail: bicep-iac rule BCP-ST-001 flagged allowBlobPublicAccess=true on storageAccount resource at infra/main.bicep:42.
Findings.Remediation: Set properties.allowBlobPublicAccess to false in main.bicep.

Findings.Title: Key vault soft-delete disabled in module
Findings.Detail: bicep-iac rule BCP-KV-002 flagged soft-delete off on Key Vault module at infra/modules/keyvault.bicep:18.
Findings.Remediation: Set enableSoftDelete to true on the Key Vault module.

Findings.Title: App Service enforces HTTPS-only
Findings.Detail: bicep-iac rule BCP-APP-001 verified httpsOnly=true on Microsoft.Web/sites resource at infra/main.bicep:118.
